mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT b.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY b.item_no ORDER BY b.bid_price DESC) rn FROM BID b WHERE b.user_no = #{userNo} ) t WHERE rn = 1
SELECT item_no, item_title, current_price, status FROM ITEM WHERE user_no = #{userNo} ORDER BY item_no DESC
SELECT i.item_no AS itemNo, i.item_title AS itemTitle, i.current_price AS currentPrice FROM WISHLIST w JOIN ITEM i ON w.item_no = i.item_no WHERE w.user_no = #{userNo}
SELECT board_no, board_title, board_date FROM BOARD_POST WHERE user_no = #{userNo} ORDER BY board_no DESC
SELECT r.reply_content AS replyContent, b.board_title AS boardTitle FROM REPLY r JOIN BOARD_POST b ON r.board_no = b.board_no WHERE r.user_no = #{userNo}

SELECT r.report_no, r.target_type, r.target_no FROM REPORT r WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM ITEM i WHERE r.target_type='item' AND i.item_no=r.target_no AND i.user_no=#{userNo} ) OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM BOARD_POST b WHERE r.target_type='board' AND b.board_no=r.target_no AND b.user_no=#{userNo} ) OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM REPLY rp WHERE r.target_type='reply' AND rp.reply_no=r.target_no AND rp.user_no=#{userNo} ) AND r.status = 'Y'
